hero.heading: Your Subdomain. Instantly Deployed.
hero.lede: Get your own .myanmardev.com subdomain in seconds. Choose your name, pick a hosting platform, and our automation workers create the DNS record — no waiting, no manual setup.
hero.footnote: powered by Cloudflare API · instant DNS propagation

how.heading: Order. Pay. Deploy. Zero human touch.
how.step1desc: Choose any available name under .myanmardev.com. Our system checks DNS availability instantly against live Cloudflare records.
how.step2desc: Connect to GitHub Pages, Vercel, Netlify, or any custom CNAME. We map your subdomain to your live project endpoint automatically.
how.step3desc: The worker creates the CNAME record via Cloudflare API the moment your payment succeeds. No approval queue. No support ticket.

coming.heading: More products coming. All automated.
coming.p1desc: Order a professionally designed static site with custom domain. Pick a template, fill your content, deploy automatically.
coming.p2desc: Showcase your projects with a polished portfolio. Add repos, deploy links, and custom branding in one flow.
coming.p3desc: Full business site with contact forms, service pages, and SEO optimization. Deploy with your custom subdomain.
coming.p4desc: Digital menu with QR code generation. Customers scan and browse your menu instantly. No app download.
coming.p5desc: Full e-commerce ordering with payment integration. Inventory management and automated order fulfillment.
coming.p6desc: Cloud POS with receipt printing, sales tracking, and inventory sync. Web-based, works on any device.
coming.p7desc: Online course platform with video hosting, quizzes, certificates. Build your own learning platform.

cta.heading: Ready to claim your subdomain?
cta.footnote: 100% automated · no account manager · instant deploy

footer.desc: Automated subdomain registration and web services for Myanmar developers. Order, deploy, done.
